originalTitle: 'Massive' numbers killed by gunmen in latest Nigeria attack, senator tells BBC
title: 'Massive' numbers killed by gunmen in latest Nigeria attack, senator tells BBC
content: Suspected Islamist militants reportedly seized control of a village for two days before being forced out by troops and air strikes.

originalTitle: Ugandan students who fled Iran air strikes recall 'ground trembling'
title: Ugandan students who fled Iran air strikes recall 'ground trembling'
content: Some opted to remain in Iran, even after their government offered to bring them home.

title: The young women who fought in Ethiopia's last civil war and don't want to see another one
content: Female fighters recall how the conflict in the northern Tigray destroyed their lives, as fears grow that fighting could resume.

originalTitle: US customs agency says it is not yet able to reimburse tariff costs
title: US customs agency says it is not yet able to reimburse tariff costs
content: Agency says process being worked out to mediate disbursement of $166bn in tariff costs to more than 330,000 importers.

title: Zelenskyy visits front line as Ukraine and Russia swap 500 prisoners each
content: Completion of two-day POW exchange one of few tangible results as peace talks stall amid Middle East turmoil.

title: CCTV video captures moment strike lands next to boys’ school in Iran
content: CCTV video showing the moment a missile struck next to a boys’ school in Iran’s Qazvin.

originalTitle: 'What is the game plan?': The Iran war is unsettling China and its ambitions
title: 'What is the game plan?': The Iran war is unsettling China and its ambitions
content: China is not feeling the shock of war in the Middle East - yet. But it is feeling the ripples.

originalTitle: Trump cuts his losses on Noem after controversial tenure at homeland security
title: Trump cuts his losses on Noem after controversial tenure at homeland security
content: Noem was one of the administration's brightest stars when she stepped into the role, but has faced a mounting backlash in recent months.

originalTitle: US and Venezuela agree to resume diplomatic ties after Maduro capture
title: US and Venezuela agree to resume diplomatic ties after Maduro capture
content: The US said the two sides would make joint efforts to promote stability after the US seized Maduro and his wife.

title: Who is to blame for Spurs' chaotic descent towards relegation?
content: BBC Sport's chief football writer Phil McNulty examines who - or what - is to blame for Spurs' crisis as they fight to avoid relegation.

originalTitle: Mexico to deploy 100,000 security personnel for World Cup
title: Mexico to deploy 100,000 security personnel for World Cup
content: World Cup co-hosts Mexico plan to deploy nearly 100,000 security personnel to protect fans at this summer's tournament, amid ongoing cartel violence in the country.

originalTitle: 'Stick with the plan' - Patience key for England, says Wiegman
title: 'Stick with the plan' - Patience key for England, says Wiegman
content: England manager Sarina Wiegman says it is "very important" her team are patient if goals do not come quickly in their 2027 Women's World Cup qualifier against Iceland on Saturday.
